titleStmt.title: Kāñcipuram, Coṉṉa Vaṇṇam Ceyta Perumāḷ temple 18

licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
śrīmaN mahā-maṇṭaleśvara rājādhirāja-rāja
parameśvara śrī-vīra-pradtāpa śrī-vīra śrī-raṅka-de
va mahārāyar praṛdhthivi-rājyyam paṇṇi Aru
ḷā niṉṟa śālivāhaṉa-śakābdaM 1000 5 100 6 ṉ
mēl cellā niṉṟa tāraṇa-saṃvaṟsarattu
śiṃka-ṉāyaṟṟu pūrva-pakṣat=tu At=ta-nakṣatrattu
pañcamiyum peṟṟa cukkiṟa-vārat=tu ṉāḷ ceyam⌈
koṇṭa-cōḻa-maṇṭalat=tu cantdrakiri-y-i
rājyattu Ūṟṟu-kāṭṭu-k-kōṭṭat=tu viṟpēṭṭu
-ṉāṭṭil nakaram kāñcipuram viṣṇu-t-taṉattil
tiru-vekā-nayiṉār kōyil śrī-paṇṭārattāru
m śrī-kāriyam ceyyum śrīmaṟ-vēta-māṟka-pra
tiṣṭhāpaṉācāriya Upaya-vētāntācāriyār-āṉa Eṭṭūr
tirumalai-k kumāra tāttācāriyar Ayyan caṉṉati Aḻaki
ya ciṅkārum śaṭamaruṣaṇa kōtrattu Āpastampa sūt
trat=tu Ejñaś śā gobhayarāṉa śrīmaṟ-vēta
māṟka pradhiṣṭhāpaṉācāriya Upaya vētāntā śāriya rāṉa
Eṭṭūrt tirumalaik kumpakōṇam tāttācāriyar
Ayyā vaiyyaṅkār kumārar tirumāl yiruñ cōlai ya
ṅkār Ayyan Avarkaḷḷukku yiv Emperumāṉ śrī
poliyūṭṭu Appam tirup paṇiyāra poliyūṭ
ṭū cammantam māka vopakṣayya-dhamma-śāsaṉa
m paṇṇi-k kuṭutta paṭi y-iv-Emperumāṉ tiru-vi
ḷaiyāṭṭattil Uḷḷūril kīḻait tāṅkal mēlait tāṅ
nañcai puñcai ṉāṟpāṟ kellaik kuḷ
ṉilam Uṇṭāna nilam māṉa tōiḷañ cōlai te
ṉṉa marat tōppukku vaṭakkum peṉṉak kōṉ tōṭṭa
ttukku kiḻakku Ōṭaiyum cōvaṭṭuk kayattuk ka
rai yiluppai tōppu veṭṭa vēḷat teṉ
ṉa marat tō ttukkum teṟkum Uppuk kuḷat
tuk kiḻakku perumāḷ kōyil Uṭaiya
kōyilukku pōṟa peruvaḻikku mēṟku
kuḷavāy veṭṭuviccak kuḷattukkum tō
ṭṭattukkum mēṟkum poykait tiruk kuḷat
til perumāḷ kōyilukku pōṟa Ūṟ vakkā
lukku vaṭakkum maṉam piriyā naṉtavanat
vaṭakkum paḷḷi koṇṭāṉ payaṭai nilam kūṭa
veḷakkuḷa Appa nilam Uṇṭāṉattil pē
ril Upakṣaya dhamma śāsaṉa māka niṟca
yittu nāṅkaḷ paṟṟi koṇṭa pu 1500
y-ip-paṇam Āyirattu Aññūṟukkum
Inta tāṅkal mēlait tāṅkal kīḻait
tāṅkal inta Etta yiṭṭa nilam Uṇṭanatu El
lām Upakṣaya dhamma śāsaṉa māka paṟṟi A
ṉupavittu koḷḷak kaṭava rākavum Anupa
vikkum iṭattu niti-nikṣēpa-jala-pāṣāṇa
Akṣaṇakṣa gāma śa
ṟakṣa-pōga-tēja-svāmiyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa Ivarē

putra pau4tra pāramparya māka Ājant3rā
ṟka māyi yāka dhānādi vinmaya vikkiṟaiyaṅkaḷu
kkum yōga māka kaṭavatākavum yippiṭi cammatit
tu Uvakṣaya taṟma śāsanam paṇṇik kuṭuttō
m yinta śāsanapaṭi pa 1500 yinta paṇam Āyirattu A
ññūkkum paṟṟiṉa viparam tiruk kōyil taḷikaikku kuṭu
tta vakaiyilum tiru veḻ kōyil tirup paṇikkum ti
ruk kōyil cilavukku mukūrttam paṟṟik koṇṭō
m Ituvē tiraviyac cilavu tāka kaṭava tākavum tiru mā
l yirum cōlai yaṅkār Ayyanukku tiru veḻkā
nayin kōyil śrī paṇṭārattārum śrī kārya ce
yvārum mōm yinta śāsanap paṭi nilam Uṇ
ṭānatu Ellām Iv vem perumānukku Appam
tirup paṇiyāra poliyūṭṭukkāka dhaṟma śāsana mā
ka tiru māli cōlai yaṅkār Ayyan camaippi
kkayil+ Inta nilam Uṇṭānatu Ellām Iv
vem perumān śrī paṇṭārattillē kaiy ko
ṇṭu Appa paṭi tirup paṇiyārap poliyūṭṭukku
naṭattiṟattukku viparam māsap piṟappu Ammāvācai
tiru vekā tēti yiraṇṭu hasta tiru nakṣatra
ṟuku tiru kṣat śrī mum Anurātā tiru natramum Ā
ka māsam Oṉṟukku Eḻu nāḷ Alaṅkāra tiru
maṉcanamum koṇ ṭaruḷi tiru vītiyum Eḻuntaru
ḷi tiruvaṭi kōyil tiru maṇṭapattil Eḻun taru
ḷi Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭi Appa paṭi ṉāḷ
Oṉṟukku Appa paṭi Oṉṟukku Arici tūṇi ve
lla patakku Eṇṇai kuṟuṇi yitukku
camaiyam tiruppaṇiyāram 52 ku viṭṭavan
viḻukkāṭu Appam 13 ḻvār Appam 2
pāttira śeṣam Umāvam kūli 52 niṟu
vākam 4kku Appam 4 Āka Appam 23 nī
kki tiruppaṇiyāram 29 tiru maṇṭa
pattilē caṉṉati tiru vōlakkattilē
viniyōkam paṇṇivika kaṭavō mākavum I
ntappaṭiyē māsam Eḻu paṭiyum tipāḷikai
Uṟiyaṭi Ukāti tiruk kāṟtikai varu ka ṟā
nālu paṭiyum Inta paṭi putra pautra pārampa
yam māka Ājandrākkamāka yinta poliyūṭ
ṭup piṟakāram naṭatti varak kaṭavō mākavum yippaṭi
cammatittu Appam poliyūṭṭukku Āka Ubhaya dhamma
śāsanam paṇṇik kuṭuttōm tiru māl yirum
cōlai yaṅkār Ayyan Avarkaḷukku śrī kāriyam
ceyvārummōm yivai Aḻaki ciṅkar kumārar
yīrāman Akṣaram tāṉattār tuyila vamana paṭṭar
coṉṉa vaṇṇam Uḷ yiṭṭār Akṣaram so
tiruc cittiṟa kūṭa paṭṭar coṉṉa vaṇṇam
Akṣaram yinta śāsaṉam Eḻutiṉamaikku
kōyil kaṇakku poykai nallūr Uṭaiyār
tiru vārttiyappan putran rāman Eḻuttu tāsa
nampi perumāḷ Eḻuttu yippaṭi Aṟivēṉ
kōyil kaṇakku nayiṉār kō nalla peru
māḷ gomarutakap perumāḷ po
This revised digital edition by Emmanuel Francis based on photos (Babu N. Ramaswamy, 2024).
ASI transcript and estampage yet to be consulted.
